metadata.description: Telegram for Claude Code — read dialogs, search globally, send/edit/react, tag Saved Messages (Premium), moderate channels. Lazy-loaded skill bundle: ~50× lower context cost than an always-on MCP server.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram agent skill — operate a real Telegram user account via the telegram-agent CLI. Reads dialogs, searches messages, sends/edits/forwards, tags Saved Messages, moderates channels. Triggers on mentions of Telegram, чаты, каналы, Saved Messages, or @channel-style peer names.
